name: Script Finder
description: Find play, opera, film, and TV scripts by running truly parallel queries against 16 search engines (7 Chinese + 9 global). Covers four script types: stage play, opera/musical, film, and television. Downloads to a user-specified path, extracts text from PDF/DOCX, and runs a 5-dimensional analysis framework tailored per script type. Ships with 5 core scripts plus a types library (search.sh, download.sh, analyze.sh, find-play.sh, benchmark.sh, lib/types.sh), 289 regression tests, and the multi-search-engine v2.2.0 submodule. Every result is tagged with a copyright status: pd / user_uploaded / copyrighted / unknown.
author: Script Finder Team

search-engine/.name: multi-search-engine
search-engine/.purpose: Provides URL configuration for 16 engines plus CN/global search-strategy documentation

play_name.description: Script title, e.g. 'Thunderstorm' (雷雨), 'Hamlet', 'The Peony Pavilion' (牡丹亭), 'Citizen Kane'.

type.description: Script type: play=stage play (default) / opera=Chinese opera, Western opera, musical / film=movie / tv=television / auto=filename-based heuristic.

author.description: Author or playwright, e.g. 'Cao Yu' (曹禺), 'Shakespeare'.

language.description: Language preference (auto infers from the title).

theme.description: Theme keyword; used only when no title is given.

save_path.description: Directory where downloaded files are saved.

auto_download.description: Auto-download the top N results (0 = search only).

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return.

items.description: Absolute path of the local file.

theme.description: To be filled by the LLM.

conflict.description: To be filled by the LLM.

style.description: To be filled by the LLM.

no_results.message: No matching scripts were found. Try a different title or theme keyword.

download_failed.message: Download failed after 2 retries. Try a different source or check the network.

path_not_writable.message: The target path is not writable. Please specify a different path.

copyright_restricted.message: This work is under copyright (copyright=copyrighted). Choose a public-domain classical work or a user_uploaded reference copy for study.

type_unknown.message: The script-type alias was not recognized. Use one of: play / opera / film / tv / auto.

text_extraction_failed.message: Text extraction failed. Install pandoc / poppler / python-docx and try again.

non_tty_blocked.message: In a non-interactive environment, pass --yes or set FIND_PLAY_YES=1.

changes: GitHub edition: full English translation of all metadata, references, docs, and code comments.
Renamed vendored submodule 搜索引擎/ → search-engine/.
Standardized version across _meta.json, config.json, metadata.json, SKILL.md, and README.md.
Reordered language_support to put English first.
Translated all schema descriptions, error messages, and changelog entries to English.
Major upgrade: find-stage-play → find-script. New --type parameter supports 4 script types.
play (default) / opera (Chinese opera, Western opera, musical) / film (movie) / tv (television).

Added scripts/lib/types.sh: a single type registry with 6 core functions (resolve_type / type_keyword_zh/en / auto_detect_type / type_framework / copyright_infer / get_reliability_ext / type_warning).
search.sh output adds a 6th column copyright (pd / user_uploaded / copyrighted / unknown).
search.sh JSON output adds a copyright key.
analyze.sh 5-dimensional skeleton switches by --type: play=acts+style / opera=scenes+aria+arias / film=scenes+audiovisual+genre / tv=episodes+series_structure+genre.
analyze.sh detect_sections() uses type-specific regexes (play=acts, opera=aria names, film=INT./EXT., tv=EPISODE/SxxExx).
find-play.sh shows 0/4 type banner, type_warning, and copyright-distribution stats.
find-play.sh supports --type auto heuristic detection.
Added references/analysis-frameworks/{play,opera,film,tv}.md, four independent frameworks.
references/analysis-framework.md rewritten as a 4-framework index.
references/drama-sources.md reorganized into a per-type source catalog.
references/reliability-scoring.md / search-strategies.md / text-extraction.md / anti-patterns.md / troubleshooting.md all updated with v2.0 sections.
Added 4 test scripts (test_types / test_copyright / test_framework / test_search_output) plus 3 fixtures (opera/film/tv).
Test count: 103 → 203 (+100: 56 types + 14 copyright + 23 framework + 7 search_output).
Metadata upgrade: types field, capabilities gains copyright-tagging, tags gain opera/film/tv/xiqu/screenplay/libretto.
Slug renamed find-play-script → find-script.
_meta.json rewritten: type_breakdown, copyright_tags, total test count 203.
Added OCR support for scanned PDFs: analyze.sh --ocr uses tesseract + pdftoppm to process image PDFs.
Tool diagnostics upgrade: when extraction fails, list every missing tool plus the install command per platform (macOS / Linux).
Added scripts/benchmark.sh: JSON output, comparison against the v1.3 baseline, 6 performance test categories.
Added LICENSE (standard MIT + non-restrictive ethical clause) and CONTRIBUTING.md (full contributor guide).
Added 3 advanced examples: example-batch-download, example-ocr-scanned, example-multi-language.
Fixed missing warn() function in analyze.sh (previously triggered command not found).
Fixed duplicate has_tesseract() in analyze.sh, unified into the has_* function group.
Fixed analyze.sh OCR temp directory with a trap cleanup to prevent leaks on Ctrl-C.
Fixed benchmark.sh measure() to retain the first 3 lines of stderr on failure for diagnostics.
TDD + TRACE optimization: cleaned stray .DS_Store files from the project root.
Version alignment: SKILL.md / _meta.json / metadata.json all bumped to 1.3.0.
Search-engine submodule upgraded v2.1.3 → v2.2.0 (35 tests passing).
Test count: 60 → 103 (+35 from submodule + 8 from submodule config tests).
Integrated submodule 搜索引擎/ (multi-search-engine v2.1.3).
search.sh refactored: automatically reads engine configuration from 搜索引擎/config.json (priority: submodule > local > built-in fallback).
Added inject_play_keyword() function: auto-injects script-context keywords (剧本 / script / filetype:pdf).
Engine-name normalization: WolframAlpha → wolframalpha (consistent with the submodule).
test_engines.sh adds submodule integration tests (config existence, 16-engine coverage, URL template consistency).
test_smoke.sh updates URL-encoding check (Chinese '剧本' UTF-8 encoded as %E5%89%A7).
SKILL.md adds submodule integration architecture diagram.
metadata.json declares the submodule dependency and fallback strategy.
Test pass rate: 59/59 → 61/61.
TRACE quality upgrade: filled in missing SKILL.md frontmatter (version / tags / license / schema_version / category / subcategory).
Removed 2 stray .DS_Store files.
Added FAQ.md (25 common questions).
Added references/anti-patterns.md (10 anti-patterns + golden rules).
SKILL.md adds TRACE self-evaluation and self-verification checklist.
Overall score: 4.34 → 4.62.
Release status: ready to publish.
search.sh runs truly parallel queries against 16 engines (curl & background).
search.sh output extracts HTML links, sorts by reliability score, and emits both JSON and TSV.
search.sh dedup fix: bing_cn and bing_int are no longer collapsed as duplicates.
download.sh defaults to non-interactive (-y / FIND_PLAY_YES=1).
download.sh adds a HEAD pre-check (Content-Type, Content-Length).
download.sh adds --retries / --max-size / --batch flags.
Added analyze.sh: PDF/DOCX/HTML/EPUB text extraction (pandoc / poppler / textutil / python-docx / pdfplumber / bs4 / ebooklib, with fallbacks).
analyze.sh auto-detects characters (leading-capital / Chinese-name + colon pattern) and acts (第一幕 / Act I).
analyze.sh outputs a 5-dimensional analysis skeleton plus the full text (--max-chars configurable).
Added find-play.sh main orchestrator: search → filter → download → analyze, end to end in one command.
Added tests/ directory: test_smoke.sh (30) + test_engines.sh (31) + test_download.sh (7) = 68 tests.
Added references/text-extraction.md / reliability-scoring.md / troubleshooting.md.
SKILL.md / README.md / 使用指南.md fully updated.
metadata.json upgraded to 1.1.0: input_schema completed, error_handling gains 2 categories.
Initial release.
Integrated 16 search engines (7 Chinese + 9 global).
Support for Chinese and English titles.
Support for PDF / DOCX / TXT / HTML download formats.
5-dimensional structured analysis framework (theme / characters / acts / conflict / style).
